articles.title: Former Queensland premier Annastacia Palaszczuk’s surgeon partner charged with rape
articles.description: Vahid Reza Adib, a bariatric surgeon in Brisbane, has been charged with rape, sexual assault and deprivation of liberty Police have charged prominent Brisbane surgeon Vahid Reza Adib – the partner of former Queensland premier Annastacia Palaszczuk – with rape. Adib, a bariatric surgeon who runs an obesity clinic at the private Wesley hospital in Brisbane’s western suburbs, attended the Southport Police Station on the Gold Coast voluntarily on Friday. He was charged with three counts of rape, two counts of depravation of liberty and one count of sexual assault. Continue reading...

articles.title: Traditional owners speak after Alice Springs riot
articles.description: Traditional owners have spoken to the Alice Springs community after a riot broke outside of the hospital last night.

articles.title: Secret compartments conceal millions of dollars in deadly drugs as Border Patrol arrest dozens
articles.description: Drug traffickers tried to outsmart authorities by stuffing narcotics into a vehicle’s roof, but federal officers shut down the scheme and seized nearly $3 million in fentanyl and methamphetamine in two rapid-fire busts this April.

articles.title: DepEd district supervisor shot dead in Zamboanga Sibugay
articles.description: PAGADIAN CITY, Zamboanga del Sur — A Department of Education (DepEd) district supervisor was shot dead by unidentified assailants in Alicia town, Zamboanga Sibugay, on Thursday evening. Police said identified the victim as Rey Dalaota Camaingking, 45, a resident of Nesoricom Village, Barangay Magdaup, Ipil, Zamboanga Sibugay. Police said the incident took place at approximately 7:35 p.m. in Sitio Guicam, Barangay Dawa-Dawa, Alicia. READ: DepEd condemns violence vs lawyer shot dead in Palawan Responding officers found Camaingking lying on the ground, bleeding from a gunshot wound to the head. Investigators revealed that Camaingking was walking toward his motorcycle at Guicam Port, [...]... Keep on reading: DepEd district supervisor shot dead in Zamboanga Sibugay

articles.title: Why Cincinnati, and other cities, keep losing police chiefs
articles.description: Soon Cincinnati will be on its fifth police chief since 2011, and 2 of those were fired. Before that, the city went 100 years without firing a chief.

articles.title: Ex-union president's theft history dates back to 1983, prosecutor says
articles.description: Diana Frey was convicted of theft in 1983. Decades later, she stole from a union she founded. She is now charged with stealing from a moving company.

articles.title: Cincinnati, county may encrypt police radio traffic, limiting access
articles.description: For decades, citizens have been able to listen in on police chatter. Cincinnati city and Hamilton County officials are considering going dark.

articles.description: Annastacia Palaszczuk's long-time surgeon partner Reza Adib has been charged with three counts of rape less than 24 hours after his luxury apartment was raided by police.

articles.title: MLA for Old Fort says province should consider buying homes impacted by multiple landslides
articles.description: The B.C. member of the legislature representing Old Fort, the community where a landslide has forced people from their homes, says he'll be meeting with constituents to discuss options for the future, including asking the province to buy their properties.
